name: Chocolate Romance Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (moderate).
2. Grease and flour two or three 8-inch layer pans or one 9x12x2 cake pan.
3. Mix all dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
4. Blend in mayonnaise, eggs, vanilla, and half of the sour cream until smooth.
5. Beat with mixer at medium speed for 2 minutes or whisk by hand for 300 strokes.
6. Add remaining sour cream and beat until well combined (2 more minutes).
7. Pour batter into prepared pans.
8. Bake for 25 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool on a rack for a few minutes before removing from pans.
10. When cool, frost cake with cream butter and cream cheese frosting (see instructions below).
Frosting Instructions:
1. Cream together butter and cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually add dry ingredients one at a time until well blended.
3. Add vanilla and blend thoroughly.
